verdict_rationale: Script blockers and prompt-policy high warnings were fixed, tests pass, and the Phase G wrapper is dry-run safe. Full Phase G main oracle is still not approved because no 16/64 Phase G dry-run artifacts exist locally for validation.

findings.title: Phase G dry-run artifacts are still absent locally
findings.evidence: reports/reasoning_floor contains no local run artifacts to validate.
findings.impact: Full Phase G main oracle remains unapproved until 16/64 dry-run artifacts exist and are reviewed.

findings.title: v4 no-abstain proposal parse rate remains warning-level in existing artifacts
findings.evidence: spec_only_holdout_report parse_gate: 6/192 proposal prompts = 3.125%; 6/384 all prompts = 1.5625%; request errors 0.
findings.impact: Acceptable for bounded dry-run monitoring; not a claim of high-performance or perfect parse stability.

findings.title: Phase F wrapper CRLF syntax blocker fixed
findings.evidence: Line endings normalized; bash -n scripts/run_phase_f_v4_ollama_holdout.sh passes.
findings.impact: Phase F wrapper is runnable again.

findings.title: Phase G wrapper now refuses accidental full-core runs
findings.evidence: No MAX_CASES exits status 2 unless ALLOW_FULL_CORE_RUN=1; bash -n passes.
findings.impact: Dry-run safety restored for wrapper invocation.

findings.title: Reasoning-floor prompts aligned to v4 spec-only policy
findings.evidence: Concrete A-box example and T-box scaffolded template examples removed from src/guardian/prompts.py; tests assert absence of scaffold wording and anchor IDs.
findings.impact: Phase G prompt contract now matches the clean v4 policy more closely.

findings.title: Abstention branch remains experimental and not Phase-G-main ready
findings.evidence: Existing abstention artifacts have 48/96 and 50/96 repair proposal parse errors; docs now state first-class parser/evaluator support is required.
findings.impact: Do not use abstention in Phase G main.

findings.title: Stale scripts/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md reconciled
findings.evidence: scripts/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md is now a thin pointer to docs-technical/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md.

findings.title: Track-diagnosis comparison rows now mark proposal metrics n/a
findings.evidence: prompt-dev comparison renderer emits n/a for Functional/Audit on track_diagnosis rows and n/a for Track acc on repair rows; existing v4 comparison markdown regenerated.
findings.impact: Reduces misleading zero-valued proposal metrics for track-only matrices.

findings.title: Repository line-ending guard added
findings.evidence: .gitattributes pins *.sh, scripts/*.md, and docs-technical/*.md to LF.

findings.title: Required non-inference tests pass
findings.impact: Current patched code paths pass the requested gate.

commands_run: env -i PATH=... HOME=... bash scripts/run_phase_g_ollama_oracle.sh (verified status 2 full-core guard)

UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.venv-wsl uv run --extra dev python -m pytest tests/test_prompt_dev.py tests/test_model_provider.py tests/test_reasoning_floor.py tests/test_track_parser.py tests/test_tbox_parser.py tests/test_patch_parser.py
regenerated prompt_dev_evaluation_comparison.md from existing summaries for v4 no-abstain and abstention artifacts
next_commands: If 16-case dry run validates cleanly: MAX_CASES=64 OUTPUT_DIR=reports/reasoning_floor/ollama_v4_spec_only_oracle_g1_64 bash scripts/run_phase_g_ollama_oracle.sh
Only after dry-run validation: ALLOW_FULL_CORE_RUN=1 OUTPUT_DIR=reports/reasoning_floor/ollama_v4_spec_only_oracle_core bash scripts/run_phase_g_ollama_oracle.sh
do_not_do: Do not run full core without ALLOW_FULL_CORE_RUN=1 and explicit approval.
Do not tune prompts against dev failures or core outputs.
Do not promote v3 scaffolded as the main prompt.
Do not use abstention branch for Phase G main until parser/evaluator support is implemented and validated.
Do not use diagnosis_routed as main scoring.
